title: Local variable and function parameter names should comply with a naming convention
description: Enforces consistent and descriptive naming conventions for local variables and function parameters.
message: Local variable or function parameter name does not comply with the specified naming convention.
recommendation: Use a consistent and descriptive naming convention.

noncompliant.code: def add(x, y): return x + y
noncompliant.description: Function parameters are not named descriptively

compliant.code: def add_numbers(num1, num2): return num1 + num2

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent naming conventions make the code harder to read and understand.
how_to_fix: Rename the local variables and function parameters to be more descriptive and follow a consistent naming convention.

metadata.title: Local variable and function parameter names should comply with a naming convention
